name: Raspberry Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Whisk egg whites and salt until stiff peaks form.
3. Stir in brown sugar until combined.
4. Mix in flour until a dough forms.
5. Line an ungreased baking sheet with parchment paper.
6. Spread batter onto the lined sheet, using a spatula to spread evenly.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set and golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire rack.
9. Once cooled, slice into bars and top with raspberry filling.
10. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
